sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71151" key="nuktaugh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτ-αυγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n71151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shining by night,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.173</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
